name: Happy Blooming body lotion
description: A blooming floral body lotion designed for Valentine's season, leaving skin soft and delicately scented with springlike florals.
archive_note: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box
nostalgia_angle: A Valentine's Kitchen exclusive evoking the romantic, rosy warmth fans associate with special Lush seasonal drops
throwback_reference: Likely references the classic Rose Jam scent family, a longtime Valentine's season favourite
